report.summary: Cycle v16: Flat — no commits, no deploys, no regressions. TS errors stable at 42, untracked files +14 (656→670 implied by total 704). Git locks now 7 days old. Production still on e999560 from Mar 17.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: DELTA SINCE v15: TS errors stable at 42 (no change). 40 in structured-data.examples.ts, 2 in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 459 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+9 from v15), 103 missing page.tsx (-2 from v15). Pages with page.tsx: 356 (+11). Some pages scaffolded by other cycles.
CARRY-OVER REGRESSION: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx JSX syntax errors (unescaped '>') — needs programmer fix.
CARRY-OVER BUG: /learn/unichain-guide-2026 and /learn/appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026 have 'use client' + metadata conflict.
BUILD: Cannot run full production build in sandbox (OOM). ignoreBuildErrors=true masks TS issues in prod. Live site unreachable from sandbox.
WORKING TREE: 47 modified tracked files (unchanged), 656 untracked files (+14 from v15). Total: 704 uncommitted entries (+14).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 CORE API ROUTES PRESENT: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields. Plus 7 utility routes (health, cache-stats, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe).
NO DELTA: Zero API route file changes since v15. All caching patterns unchanged.
CACHE STATUS: 6/6 core routes have Cache-Control headers. /api/defi-yields still CDN-only (no in-memory cache).
FALLBACK DATA: 2/6 core routes have fallback (prices, market-dominance). 4/6 will error on upstream failure — unchanged from v15.
RATE LIMITING: 0/6 core API routes wired to rate limiter. Only /api/cache-stats and /api/health have rate limiting. Carry-over P1.
LIVE HEALTH: Cannot verify from sandbox (egress blocked). Production should be serving from e999560 if Vercel is healthy.

sections.title: DevOps
items: GIT LOCKS PERSIST [P0 — 7 DAYS]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) and .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) still present. All git commit/push blocked.
LAST COMMIT: e999560 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)' — Mar 17, 6 days ago.
PRODUCTION BUILD: e999560 running on Vercel (project: cryptodegen). No deploy since Mar 17.
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 704 entries (+14 from v15). Local-to-production divergence continues growing each cycle via automated tasks.
PRODUCTION UNREACHABLE FROM SANDBOX: degen0x.com blocked by egress. Cannot verify Vercel deployment health directly.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → stage changes → commit → push → Vercel auto-deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing. Zero commits, zero deploys, zero page promotions.
POSITIVE DELTA: +11 page.tsx files now exist vs published slugs (356 up from 345). Pages scaffolded by other automated cycles.
NEGATIVE DELTA: +14 untracked files. Working tree continues accumulating drift.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7 DAYS]: Git lock files must be manually cleared before ANY progress reaches production.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 pages with 'use client'+metadata conflict need programmer fix.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to any core API route.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 4/6 API routes missing fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no matching page.tsx.
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITY: (1) Clear git locks [Jefe action], (2) fix crypto-index-funds JSX, (3) commit + push + deploy.
